channel.title: NAVADMIN / ALNAV Updates
channel.description: Recent NAVADMIN and ALNAV message notifications.

item.title: NAVADMIN - NAVADMIN-304-23 - ANNOUNCING NEW YEARS DAY DECK LOG POEM CONTEST FOR 2024 CORRECTED COPY.summary
item.description: # AI Summary _AI-generated summary. Verify details against the full official message._ **Summary of NAVADMIN 304/23** The Naval History and Heritage Command (NHHC) announces the New Year's Day [K Deck Log Poem Contest for 2024, calling for submissions by 2359 eastern day[3D[K

item.title: NAVADMIN 115/26 - NAVY WOUNDED WARRIOR ANNOUNCES THE TEAM NAVY ROSTER FOR 2026 WARRIOR GAMES
item.description:
# AI Summary
_AI-generated summary. Verify details against the full official message._
**Summary of NAVADMIN 115/26**
**Subject:** Congratulations to Team Navy Members Selected for the 2026 War[3D[K Warrior Games
**Announcement Date:** May 26, 2026 **Deadline/Required Actions:** None specified.
**Details:** - **Team Members:** A list of selected Sailors and Coast Guardsmen are cong[4D[K congratulated. - **Event Details:** The 2026 Warrior Games will be held in San Antonio, TX[2D[K TX from June 1 to 8, featuring adaptive sports competitions for wounded war[3D[K warriors. - **Program Information:** Navy Wounded Warrior coordinates personalized no[2D[K non-medical care post-injury/illness and offers opportunities like the Warr[4D[K Warrior Games. Commands are encouraged to support participation requests.
**Resources:** - More information available at [navywoundedwarrior.com](https://www.navywo[43D[K [navywoundedwarrior.com](https://www.navywoundedwarrior.com). - Contact details provided for Navy Wounded Warrior program.
Verify details against the full official message.
